en: Ephraim feeds on the wind and pursues the east wind all day long; they multiply falsehood and violence; they make a covenant with Assyria, and oil is carried to Egypt.
zh: “以法蓮吃風， 整天追趕東風， 增添虛謊和強暴。 他們與亞述結盟， 又給埃及送油。”

en: The LORD has an indictment against Judah and will punish Jacob according to his ways; he will repay him according to his deeds.
zh: 耶和華與猶大爭辯； 他必照雅各所行的懲罰他， 按他所作的報應他。

en: In the womb he took his brother by the heel, and in his manhood he strove with God.
zh: 他在母腹中抓住他哥哥的腳跟， 壯年的時候又與 神角力。

en: He strove with the angel and prevailed; he wept and sought his favor. He met God at Bethel, and there God spoke with us-
zh: 他與天使角力，並且得勝； 他哀哭，向他求恩。 他在伯特利遇見 神， 神在那裡對他說話。

en: the LORD, the God of hosts, the LORD is his memorial name:
zh: 耶和華是萬軍的 神， 耶和華是他的名號。

en: "So you, by the help of your God, return, hold fast to love and justice, and wait continually for your God."
zh: 所以你要靠著你的 神歸回， 謹守忠信和公平， 常常等候你的 神。

en: A merchant, in whose hands are false balances, he loves to oppress.
zh: 以色列是個商人，手裡拿著詭詐的天平，喜愛欺壓別人。

en: Ephraim has said, "Ah, but I am rich; I have found wealth for myself; in all my labors they cannot find in me iniquity or sin."
zh: 以法蓮說：“我成了富翁， 我為自己發了財； 在我所有的收益中， 人不能找出我有甚麼罪孽，可算為罪惡的。”

en: I am the LORD your God from the land of Egypt; I will again make you dwell in tents, as in the days of the appointed feast.
zh: “自從你出埃及地以來， 我就是耶和華你的 神； 我必使你再住在帳棚裡， 像在節日的日子一樣，

en: I spoke to the prophets; it was I who multiplied visions, and through the prophets gave parables.
zh: 我曾對先知說話， 加添許多異象； 又藉先知說比喻。

en: If there is iniquity in Gilead, they shall surely come to nothing: in Gilgal they sacrifice bulls; their altars also are like stone heaps on the furrows of the field.
zh: 在基列仍有罪孽， 他們實在是沒有價值的。 他們在吉甲獻牛犢為祭， 他們的祭壇好像田間犁溝中的石堆。”

en: Jacob fled to the land of Aram; there Israel served for a wife, and for a wife he guarded sheep.
zh: 從前雅各逃到亞蘭地， 以色列為得妻子而作工， 為得妻子而替人放羊。

en: By a prophet the LORD brought Israel up from Egypt, and by a prophet he was guarded.
zh: 後來，耶和華藉著一位先知把以色列從埃及領上來， 也藉著一位先知，以色列得蒙看顧。

en: Ephraim has given bitter provocation; so his Lord will leave his bloodguilt on him and will repay him for his disgraceful deeds.
zh: 以法蓮大大地惹了主的烈怒， 所以，他的主把他流人血的罪歸到他身上，把他當受的羞辱歸給他。
